category_sources: Official curl documentation describes curl as URL-based data transfer tooling.
source_facts.description says curl gets files from HTTP, HTTPS, or FTP servers.
display_name_sources: Official curl homepage and documentation use lowercase curl.
docs_sources: Official curl.se /docs page is the dedicated documentation index.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from official curl GitHub organization/repository and official project metadata.
tags_sources: Official curl repository describes a command-line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax.
source_facts.description mentions HTTP, HTTPS, and FTP retrieval.
